title: mallotus subpeltatus
intro: Mallotus subpeltatus, also known as Chinese chebula, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Studies have shown that Mallotus subpeltatus has various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
